title: stelis laevis
intro: Stelis laevis is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and sore throats due to its antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and supporting the immune system. Stelis laevis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
